docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUI, CHRISTINE
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUI, CHRISTINE HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY GREWAL, PAWAN BUI, CHRISTINE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GREWAL, PAWAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT BUI, CHRISTINE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL FILED BY APPELLANT BUI, CHRISTINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREWAL, PAWAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUI, CHRISTINE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, DEFENDANT RETAINED IN BAD FAITH PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00. STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,000.00 ARE INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(L) IN BAD FAITH. ALSO INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE DAMAGES UNDER CIVIL CODE SECTION 51 AND 52 ($4,000) AND DAMAGES AWARDED PURSUANT TO S.F. ADMINISTRATIVE CODE SECTION 37.10B ($3,000). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

NOTICE OF APPEAL (FROM MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT) FILED BY APPELLANT BUI, CHRISTINE MAILED TO RESPONDENT BUI, CHRISTINE

ORDER CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 19, 2016 AT 5:30 TO CURE TIME ON PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-06-2017 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Respondent Pawan Grewal appears in Pro Per.
Defendant/Appellant Christine Bui appears in Pro Per.

Motion to Vacate is heard and taken under submission.
Plaintiff and Defendant testified on their own behalf.
The following Exhibits were introduced by appellant and retained.
#1- photographs
#2- Group of documents.

Exhibits in the court file previously introduced by Plaintiff were reviewed by the Court.

Matter is taken under submission

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2017 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
